steps.title: Find the vertex from the zeros' midpoint
steps.content: In factored form, the zeros are at $2x-20=0$ ($x=10$) and $2x+8=0$ ($x=-4$). The vertex x-coordinate is the midpoint: $$x = \frac{10 + (-4)}{2} = 3.$$

steps.title: Substitute to find $f(3)$
steps.content: Substitute back into the factored form: $$f(3) = (2(3)-20)(2(3)+8) = (-14)(14) = -196.$$

steps.title: State the minimum
steps.content: The minimum value is $-196$. The answer is -196.
